posts.name: Julien FROGER
posts.cooked:
Dear All,

I have spoken in length with Lalou Bize Leroy during lunch time (I was at the Domaine this morning).
She has asked me to do a press release in this board to clarify the matter.

The domaine and the negoce of LEROY has never been for sale and is not going to be for sale anytime in the future.
They have never received any offer from LVMH and they are not seeking for any offer.

Madame Bize Leroy is particularly unhappy about these rumours which are not true and wish this stops immediately.

Best regards,

Julien FROGER
L’IMPERATRICE LTD.

posts.name: Lalou Bize Leroy
posts.cooked:
We Hereby formally deny any and all rumors circulating concerning a possible sale of Domaine Leroy or Maison Leroy. Neither are for sale.
Nous démentons formellement les rumeurs qui progressent sur le net : Ni la maison Leroy ni le Domaine Leroy ne sont à vendre.

Lalou Bize Leroy
